function.outcome_justification: In 50_finance/invoices/2026_02_08__eur_000890__inv_0004__northstar_design_partner_sprint.md, the line item 'follow-up timeline prototype review' has line_eur 240. In 50_finance/invoices/2026_03_20__eur_000420__inv_0005__northstar_followup_pack.md, the same line item has line_eur 240. Both issued_on dates are on/after 2026-02-01, so total earned since beginning of February 2026 is 480.
